meta.title: America's air-launched ICBM program (was successful)
meta.description:
We covered this story with more depth in an early video, but we thought it was about time to revisit it. Back in 1974, the Air Mobility Feasibility Demonstration Program aimed to field America's Minuteman I ICBMs as air-launched weapons... and it worked. 

If you thought Kinzhal was something, wait until you see this.
